name: bids-classify
description: Auto-classify DICOM series into BIDS datatypes and suffixes using heuristics

sidecars.description: dcm2niix sidecar JSON files to classify

overrides.description: User-provided classification overrides from the form

mappings.description: Classified series with BIDS datatype, suffix, confidence, and auto-assigned run numbers

subjects.description: Detected subjects and sessions grouped by PatientID and AcquisitionDate

block.description: Select which subjects to include or exclude

block.label: Participants & Sessions
block.description: Edit subject labels, session names, and demographics

block.label: Classify for BIDS
block.description: Auto-detect and review BIDS datatype/suffix for each series
